untranslatable_reason: The signal requires: (1) Detection of 'institutional positioning has already occurred' — no available indicator measures institutional order flow or positioning directly; (2) Distinction between 'institutional distribution' vs 'retail rush' — would require order book/tape data not in allowed indicators; (3) Parameter thresholds marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] — specific values not provided in source material. The core concept of trading after institutional positioning but before retail absorption cannot be reliably expressed using only price, volume, and technical indicators without order flow analysis.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using Donchian breakout (dc_upper) as resistance proxy, volume_ratio below threshold to indicate low retail participation, and skip-bars logic would require separate execution layer. However, the fundamental mechanism—detecting institutional positioning vs retail participation—requires order flow data (large block trades, accumulation patterns, smart money flow) not available in the allowed indicator set. A complete backtest would need custom order flow indicators or institutional positioning metrics.
